title: polyarrhena reflexa
intro: Polyarrhena reflexa, also known as the Reflexed Polyarrhena or Polyarrhena reflexa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like citral, geraniol, and limonene, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Polyarrhena reflexa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Polyarrhena reflexa is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be applied topically or ingested under medical supervision.
